settings.heading: Mobile Auto Detailing in Seattle That Comes to You

settings.text:
Interior detailing, exterior details, ceramic coating, dog hair removal, stain cleanup, and paint protection at your home or office.

Suds Auto Salon is a private, appointment-only mobile detailing service run by Sam. I bring the tools, waterless-safe methods, steam cleaning, and detailing products directly to your location so you can get a real detail without sitting in a shop or rearranging your whole day.

Whether your vehicle needs a deep interior reset, a clean exterior with protection, or a ceramic coating package, the goal is simple: make your vehicle feel better to drive, easier to maintain, and worth showing off again.

  • Mobile detailing at your home or office
  • Interior deep cleaning for stains, dirt, and odors
  • Exterior wash, decontamination, and protection
  • Ceramic coating and paint correction options
  • Serving Seattle, Edmonds, Everett, Marysville, and nearby areas

Why drivers book Suds Auto Salon

When you book Suds Auto Salon, you’re getting one detailer, one process, and one standard on every job. I’m not rushing your vehicle through a volume shop. I’m focused on the details that actually change how the vehicle looks and feels:

  • Steam cleaning and deep interior work for built-up grime
  • Dog hair, crumbs, dust, and spill cleanup
  • Safe hand washing and paint decontamination
  • Wax and protection that helps your paint hold up in Pacific Northwest weather
  • Clear pricing and realistic time expectations
  • Mobile convenience without cutting corners

If you want a consistent mobile detail from the same person every time, this is built for that.

Mobile detailing services people actually book

Interior Detailing

Best for dirty daily drivers, kid messes, pet hair, stained seats, dusty plastics, and interiors that need a real reset. Deep vacuuming, steam cleaning, wipe-downs, glass cleaning, and targeted stain treatment depending on condition.

Exterior Detailing

Best for vehicles that have lost gloss, feel rough to the touch, or need a proper wash and protection. Hand wash, wheel cleaning, decontamination, and protection that helps the finish stay cleaner longer.

Full Detail

Best for vehicles that need both inside and outside brought back at once. A strong option before selling a vehicle, after a long winter, or when maintenance has been ignored for too long.

Ceramic Coating & Paint Correction

Best for drivers who want better gloss, easier maintenance, and longer-term paint protection. Paint correction removes defects and improves clarity before the coating is applied.

settings.heading: Mobile detailing service area
settings.subheading: Suds Auto Salon serves drivers in Seattle, Edmonds, Everett, Marysville, and surrounding areas within about 30 miles of Seattle. If you want professional detailing without dropping your car off at a shop, I come to your driveway, office, or agreed service location.

settings.heading: Built for owners who want results, not shortcuts
settings.subheading: A proper detail should do more than make a car look shiny for one afternoon. It should make the interior feel clean every time you get in, make the exterior easier to wash, and help the vehicle hold its value over time.That’s the standard at Suds Auto Salon: careful work, clear service packages, and mobile convenience without the rushed-shop feel.
